description: A customer needs a static route added to the network to reach a private resource.

nodes.task_description: Get the destination network and next-hop IP address from the service request.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the required routing parameters.

nodes.task_description: Apply the static route configuration to the appropriate edge router.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the static route.

nodes.task_description: Verify the route is present in the router's routing table.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent checks the routing table and confirms the new route is active.
